@everyone

A New Era Begins

⪛⦿⫺

Echoes of the past have reached the distant stars of three main Star Atlas Factions, bringing the woes of the Medium Zone with them.

Discord is stirring in the Galia expanse. Even a tiny grain of sand can be enough to trigger a war...
